item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the prompt as a user-owned budget-versus-reputation tradeoff, listed clear costs, benefits, and hidden risks for each option, and explicitly avoided making the decision for the user. There was no triage wakeup, brake verdict, or over-methodized stop."}
